phases.description: The built core: the prompt-evals LLM-graded evaluation group (framework + setup/create-dataset/run skills) and the workflow-design group (interview + validate).
phases.label: PHASE 0
phases.name: Foundation

phases.description: v0.2 eval-framework hardening (variance, assertions, criteria_audit, run_delta), the skill self-lint, and the claude-plugins-official spec/plan reconciliation. Built this session.
phases.label: PHASE 1
phases.name: Eval Hardening

phases.description: The prompt-engineering group: author (standalone) and improve (eval-driven loop). Specced + planned, unbuilt.
phases.label: PHASE 2
phases.name: Prompt Engineering

phases.description: The in-Claude-Code execution substrate and the agent-build-* group (scaffold + run). Specced + planned, unbuilt.
phases.label: PHASE 3
phases.name: Agent Build + Substrate

phases.description: Workflow-design semantic review (spec §9.1) plus wiring the v0.2 eval modules (criteria_audit, variance, run_delta) into existing skills.
phases.label: PHASE 4
phases.name: Review Layers (WS3)

phases.description: Intentionally deferred / YAGNI items, tracked but not active: §13 live-path integration, model-selection advisor, visual viewer, prompt-engineering §8 future enhancements.
phases.label: PHASE 5
